# Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / infra
- [ ] Dependency bump

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally (type-check + lint + format)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally (for changes that touch app code)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavioral changes
- [ ] Docs / `.env.example` updated if user-facing or config changed
- [ ] No new dependencies added without noting why in the summary

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky, open questions, follow-up work, screenshots. -->
